creator: bugs@mailinator.com
text:
This 'stable' packages of a supported train, 8-amd64, is over 9 months old.
Even packages-8.4-release is newer ('stable' should be maintained and newer than any release until train is EOL).

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-8-stable/


> something bad with your math?

Yes, specified wrong arch, oops.
